indicators.name: Large desk
indicators.rationale: A large desk provides ample space for a computer setup and other work materials.

indicators.name: Good lighting
indicators.rationale: The natural light from the windows and artificial lighting from the ceiling fixtures provide good illumination for work tasks.

indicators.name: Comfortable seating
indicators.rationale: The couches provide comfortable seating options for extended periods of work.

indicators.name: Minimal distractions
indicators.rationale: The layout of the room is open and uncluttered, reducing distractions and providing a clear view of the workspace.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is well-suited for computer work (solo) with ample space, good lighting, comfortable seating, and minimal distractions.
